'''Iliox Arguun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]], who worked at the [[University of Sanbra]] for a number of years as a [[Professor/Legends|Professor]] of Anatomy. From his knowledge of anatomy, physiology, and his experience with creatures, he was able to draw the skeleton of any living creature, without looking inside the body.

When the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] was instituted, Iliox became increasingly withdrawn and reserved.
